description: Composition Beige shorts that have two side pockets, two back pockets with flaps and press buttoned closures, stitch detailing, embroidery on the left thigh, has two patch pockets with flaps and press buttoned closures on the sides with smaller pockets on the front and back at the hem, zipped and buttoned closure and belt loops on the waist Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations His cuteness level will be off the chart when you dress your little boy in these shorts from doodle. Team this with a T-shirt and sandals, and let your little one play in comfort.
